'''Varristad''' was a small [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Varristad system/Legends|Varristad system]] within the [[Abrion sector/Legends|Abrion sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Description==
Since the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] had no [[atmosphere]], all of the inhabitants lived in a large [[habitation dome]] owned by a rival of [[Offworld Mining Corporation]]. When the dome was compromised by [[Jemba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], over 250,000 people were [[Death/Legends|killed]]. The company mining the planet went bankrupt, and the mining rights were cheaply obtained by Offworld.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Rising Force]]'' {{1stm}}

*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
